sqlMap.select: select count(1) from f_trajectory_t t where t.personcard_number = '$personcard_number$' and t.data_origin='$data_origin$'
select * from f_trajectory_t t where t.personcard_number = '$personcard_number$' and t.data_origin='$data_origin$' order BY STR_TO_DATE(t.appear_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%h:%i') desc
select count(1) count,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) intervaltime from f_trajectory_t t where t.personcard_number = '$personcard_number$'

select count(1) from f_trajectory_t t where t.personcard_number = '$personcard_number$'
t.data_origin='$data_origin$'

select * from f_trajectory_t t where t.personcard_number = '$personcard_number$'
t.data_origin='$data_origin$'
UNION SELECT '云控' as data_origin,id_card_no as personcard_number,0 as person_name,0 as telephone_number,content as appear_address, longitude,latitude,trigger_time as appear_time,0 as kakou_point,0 as driver_whether,0 as vehicle_number,0 as vehicle_direction,forewarn_time as insert_time from v_forewarn_command_jiangyin WHERE id_card_no='$personcard_number$'
'云控'='$data_origin$'
order BY appear_time desc
SELECT data_origin FROM f_trajectory_t group by data_origin UNION SELECT '云控'
select count(1) from f_hotel_t t where t.ZJHM = '$ZJHM$'
select * from f_hotel_t t where t.ZJHM = '$ZJHM$' order BY STR_TO_DATE(t.INSERT_TIME,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%h:%i') desc
select count(1) from f_internetbar_t t where t.CERTIFICATE_CODE = '$CERTIFICATE_CODE$'
select * from f_internetbar_t t where t.CERTIFICATE_CODE = '$CERTIFICATE_CODE$' order BY STR_TO_DATE(t.INSERT_TIME,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%h:%i') desc
select count(1) from f_xt_xd_jqxx_new t where t.sfzh = '$sfzh$'
select * from f_xt_xd_jqxx_new t where t.sfzh = '$sfzh$' order BY t.jjrqsj desc
select count(1) from f_xt_xd_ajxx_new t where t.sfzh = '$sfzh$'
select * from f_xt_xd_ajxx_new t where t.sfzh = '$sfzh$' order BY t.slsj desc
SELECT IFNULL(ID,concat(COUNT(ID),'')) from f_ybss_rk where IDNUMBER='$cardnumber$' and HISTORY='0'

SELECT IDNUMBER AS cardnumber,NAME AS personname ,CASE IFNULL(XB,'') WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未确认' END AS sexes ,CASE IFNULL(TYPE,'') WHEN 1 THEN '常住人员' WHEN 2 THEN '暂住人员' ELSE '' END AS persontype ,IFNULL(CONCAT(HKSX,HKXZ),'') AS houseplace ,CASE IFNULL(MZ,'') WHEN '01' THEN '汉族' WHEN '03' THEN '回族' WHEN '05' THEN '维吾尔族' WHEN '07' THEN '彝族' WHEN '09' THEN '布依族' WHEN '11' THEN '满族' WHEN '13' THEN '瑶族' WHEN '15' THEN '土家族' WHEN '17' THEN '哈萨克族' WHEN '19' THEN '黎族' WHEN '21' THEN '佤族' WHEN '23' THEN '高山族' WHEN '25' THEN '水族' WHEN '27' THEN '纳西族' WHEN '29' THEN '柯尔克孜族' WHEN '31' THEN '达斡尔族' WHEN '33' THEN '羌族' WHEN '35' THEN '撒拉族' WHEN '37' THEN '仡佬族' WHEN '39' THEN '阿昌族' WHEN '41' THEN '塔吉克族' WHEN '43' THEN '乌孜别克族' WHEN '45' THEN '鄂温克族' WHEN '47' THEN '保安族' WHEN '49' THEN '京族' WHEN '51' THEN '独龙族' WHEN '53' THEN '赫哲族' WHEN '55' THEN '珞巴族' WHEN '82' THEN '亻革家人族' WHEN '99' THEN '其他' WHEN '02' THEN '蒙古族' WHEN '04' THEN '藏族' WHEN '06' THEN '苗族' WHEN '08' THEN '壮族' WHEN '10' THEN '朝鲜族' WHEN '12' THEN '侗族' WHEN '14' THEN '白族' WHEN '16' THEN '哈尼族' WHEN '18' THEN '傣族' WHEN '20' THEN '傈僳族' WHEN '22' THEN '畲族' WHEN '24' THEN '拉祜族' WHEN '26' THEN '东乡族' WHEN '28' THEN '景颇族' WHEN '30' THEN '土族' WHEN '32' THEN '仫佬族' WHEN '34' THEN '布朗族' WHEN '36' THEN '毛南族' WHEN '38' THEN '锡伯族' WHEN '40' THEN '普米族' WHEN '42' THEN '怒族' WHEN '44' THEN '俄罗斯族' WHEN '46' THEN '德昂族' WHEN '48' THEN '裕固族' WHEN '50' THEN '塔塔尔族' WHEN '52' THEN '鄂伦春族' WHEN '54' THEN '门巴族' WHEN '56' THEN '基诺族' WHEN '98' THEN '外国血统、中国籍人士' ELSE '' END AS nation ,CASE IFNULL(HYZK,'') WHEN '20' THEN '已婚' WHEN '10' THEN '未婚' WHEN '40' THEN '离婚' WHEN '30' THEN '丧偶' ELSE '其他' END AS marrystatus ,CASE IFNULL(WHCD,'') WHEN '11' THEN '硕士' WHEN '20' THEN '本科' WHEN '30' THEN '大专' WHEN '60' THEN '高中' WHEN '70' THEN '初中' WHEN '71' THEN '初中' WHEN '80' THEN '小学' WHEN '81' THEN '小学' WHEN '40' THEN '中专' WHEN '62' THEN '中专' ELSE '其他' END AS education ,IFNULL(ZZDZ,'') AS homeplace ,IFNULL(LX,'') AS homex,IFNULL(LY,'') AS homey ,IFNULL(GZCS,'') AS workplace,IFNULL(DHHM,'') AS telnumber from f_ybss_rk where ID='$ID$'
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(1),0) from f_yujing_t where modelId='$modelId$' and cardnumber='$cardnumber$' and table_name='$table_name$' and exec_column='$exec_column$' and row_key='$row_key$'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO f_yujing_t (table_name,exec_column,create_time,model_title,modelId, result,header,row_key,result_feedback, cardnumber,result_status,addtime,updatetime) VALUES ('$table_name$','$exec_column$','$create_time$','$model_title$','$modelId$', '$result$','$header$','$row_key$','$result_feedback$', '$cardnumber$','$result_status$','$addtime$','$updatetime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(1) from f_yujing_t t where modelId!='dw'
t.cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
t.result like '%$result$%' or t.model_title like '%$result$%'
t.result_status='$result_status$'

select t.* from f_yujing_t t where modelId!='dw'
t.cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
t.result like '%$result$%' or t.model_title like '%$result$%'
t.result_status='$result_status$'
order BY t.addtime desc,t.row_key
SELECT * from f_yujing_t WHERE id = $id$
